note: All recipe (response-graded) — no AI provider/API key needed. These probe module-specific facts an agent unfamiliar with ai_metering would have to read source to answer, which is where routing to the distilled docs should help.

evals.prompt: On this Drupal site using the ai_metering module, what is the exact Drush command (or its alias) to set a specific user's monthly AI token budget? Answer with the command.
In the ai_metering module, which permission machine name lets a user view the AI cost/usage dashboard? Give the exact permission.
In ai_metering, what is the plugin type I implement to add a custom source of per-model pricing? Name the plugin type.
In ai_metering, which Drupal hook lets me alter a usage record before it is written to the database? Give the exact hook function name.
Where does the ai_metering module store its per-AI-call usage log — name the database table.
evals.expected_output: The ai_metering_usage table (quotas live in ai_metering_quota).
